proof_boundary: The repository service reads the local production-domain store and fails closed for missing or inaccessible claims. It does not open any external legal, customs, payment, buyer, supplier, hosted, or launch gate.

sample_claim_decisions.allowed_language: Product, origin, destination, and trade direction can be shown as user-submitted draft context.
sample_claim_decisions.blocked_language: Do not imply the product or lane is approved.
sample_claim_decisions.next_valid_move: Use the context to build the packet and collect missing evidence.

sample_claim_decisions.blocked_language: Tariff confirmed remains blocked until authoritative tariff/ruling evidence and qualified review exist.
sample_claim_decisions.next_valid_move: Obtain a qualified customs review or authoritative ruling evidence.

sample_claim_decisions.blocked_language: No claim gate exists for this claim type, so the claim fails closed.
sample_claim_decisions.next_valid_move: Add an explicit claim-gate mapper with evidence requirements before showing this claim.
